web-mobile.title: Web & Mobile Development
web-mobile.description: Engineering high-performance, SEO-optimized Next.js React web applications and native-feel React Native mobile experiences.
web-mobile.details: Building and maintaining complex user interfaces (UIs) using React.js and Next.js. This includes creating reusable components, managing component state, and ensuring a consistent user experience. I focus on writing clean, efficient, and well-documented code following enterprise best practices.

cloud-devops.title: Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps
cloud-devops.description: Architecting scalable AWS and Render environments with Docker containerization and automated CI/CD performance gates.
cloud-devops.details: Designing robust cloud architectures that scale with your user base. I implement Docker to ensure environment parity and set up automated pipelines that run performance audits and integration tests before every deployment, ensuring 99.9% uptime.

ai-automation.title: AI Automation & LLM Orchestration
ai-automation.description: Building autonomous AI agents and precision RAG pipelines using LangGraph to automate complex business logic.
ai-automation.details: Developing 'fully intelligent' systems that go beyond simple chatbots. By using LangGraph, I build agents capable of multi-step reasoning, tool usage, and complex decision-making to automate manual business processes and scheduling.
